Document:
# Crafting Systems Reference
Quick reference for the crafting systems in OpenEdge 14.
## Systems
[bold]OE14Workbench[/bold] — recipe-based crafting at a workbench entity. Player selects recipe and waits for DoAfter to complete.
[bold]OE14Cooking[/bold] — temperature-based item transformation. Items change when reaching certain temperature thresholds.
[bold]OE14ModularCraft[/bold] — assembly crafting where components are combined. Stat modifiers can affect results.
## Adding a Crafting Recipe
Recipes are defined in YAML prototypes:
- type: OE14WorkbenchRecipe id: IronSwordRecipe result: IronSword ingredients: - type: IronIngot amount: 2 - type: WoodHandle amount: 1 craftTime: 5.0
## File Locations
- [mono]Content.Shared/_OE14/Crafting/[/mono] - [mono]Content.Server/_OE14/Crafting/[/mono] - [mono]Resources/Prototypes/_OE14/Recipes/[/mono]
## Content Under Construction
Full crafting system reference coming soon.
